entity.magic_realms.tavernkeep.name: Tavernkeeper Lv.??
gui.magic_realms.human_info.title: Entity Information
message.magic_realms.aliana.combat.root: %s: I love rooting people! It's my favorite spell!
message.magic_realms.aliana.eat.poison_p: %s: Despite common belief poisonous potatoes can't kill you! They taste bad though.......
message.magic_realms.aliana.travel.nethe: %s: PLEASE don't take me to a fortress......
message.magic_realms.already_immortal: %s: Thanks but i don't need that, i already have my own pass
message.magic_realms.amadeus.boss.killed: %s: By the Arbiter, that was a difficult fight!
message.magic_realms.amadeus.combat.cont: %s: Hang in there, %s! You can do it!
message.magic_realms.amadeus.combat.ente: %s: This is the Spell passed down in the Voidwalker Family for generations!
message.magic_realms.amadeus.enderman.ki: %s: You know, you remind me of my Archmage Familiar Astias, she’s in a better place now.
message.magic_realms.amadeus.enderman.sc: %s: If only Astias were still here, she was an Archmage familiar you know?
message.magic_realms.catas.geology.respo: %s: Isn’t geology just super cool? I mean like, it’s incredible that you can tell the history of rock just by looking at it!
message.magic_realms.catas.moth.response: %s: I love moths! Very adorable creatures, did you know that most of them don’t even have a mouth? it’s really interesti- you don’t care? Oh…
message.magic_realms.catas.pumpkin_pie.r: %s: You have pumpkin pie?! Can I have some?! Please!?
message.magic_realms.catas.pumpkin_pie.t: %s: YIPPEE! Thank you! I love pumpkin pie!
message.magic_realms.custom_raid.start: People saw your coin and will try to snatch it. Survive and get your fortune!
message.magic_realms.granted_immortality: %s: Oh, i've been searching for this pass for a long time, thank you so much!
message.magic_realms.tavernkeep_tip: Tavernkeep: I don't know the exact method, but i've heard rumours about a book called Necronomicon that has information regarding blood magic
tooltip.magic_realms.blood_pact: Has the ability to bind two souls forever
tooltip.magic_realms.contract.usage_desc: Right-click on entities to hire them
tooltip.magic_realms.hell_pass: Give to any human to allow him survive fatal hits
Requires 200+ minutes of previous contracts with entity
tooltip.magic_realms.raid_item: Legends say that this coin can grant immense fortune to the user, but be careful since other people might want to snatch it if you try to use it.
ui.magic_realms.already_have_contract: %s: Sorry, i'm already contracted by someone else
ui.magic_realms.blood_experiment_result: The result of the experiment was quite surprising, since it seemed like hurting a test subject with the devour spell had a reaction with contract items, but i couldn't transform the test contracts.
ui.magic_realms.blood_experiment_result_: Maybe the experiment subject was too weak to get enough blood from it? Or maybe the test contracts were too low to get infused with blood magic?
ui.magic_realms.blood_experiment_text: I've noticed that some blood spells have secondary effects on the caster, so i started an experiment to transform my offhand item into a different item by imbuing blood magic into it.
ui.magic_realms.contract_established: %s: Okay, i'll accept the contract for %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.contract_established_per: %s: Fine, i'll accept the permanent contract
ui.magic_realms.contract_expired: %s: I've completed our contract, see you
ui.magic_realms.contract_extended: %s: Fine, i'll extend our contract %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.contract_failed: Failed to establish contract - please try again!
ui.magic_realms.contract_reject_permanen: %s: Sorry but i don't want to be tied to anyone forever
ui.magic_realms.contract_time_permanent: %s: In case you forgot, our contract never expires
ui.magic_realms.contract_time_remaining_: %s: In case you forgot, the contract will last for %d:%02d
ui.magic_realms.entity_level_too_low: %s: Sorry but i can't accept that tier of contracts
ui.magic_realms.introduction.aliana: %s: MtheNinja? No no no that's not me..... But I am available for hire though!!! If you want to contract me, i'll only accept a %s, which will last for %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.introduction.alshanex: %s: Hey there, i'm Alshanex, not the mod creator but just a random roaming mage, trust. Anyways, i'm a mage who likes to use Sunbeam and a couple movement spells, because i saw the tavernkeep fighting like this and thought he looked very cool. If you want to contract me, i'll only accept a %s, which will last for %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.introduction.amadeus: %s: Salutations! I am Amadeus, the  Starfire Sorcerer! If you wish to contract me, i'll only accept a %s, which will last for %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.introduction.archer: %s: Hello, i'm a mercenary specialized in long range combat with my bow. I only accept a %s, which will last for %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.introduction.assassin: %s: Hello, i'm a mercenary specialized in close range combat and my specialty is dodging attacks and dealing high damage. I only accept a %s, which will last for %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.introduction.catas: %s: I don’t know why I’m here, I don’t drink and I don’t really know anyone. Anyways, if you want to contract me, i'll only accept a %s, which will last for %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.introduction.default: %s: Hello, i'm a mercenary ready to serve. I only accept a %s, which will last for %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.introduction.mage: %s: Hello, i'm a mercenary specialized in fighting with magic. I only accept a %s, which will last for %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.introduction.warrior: %s: Hello, i'm a mercenary specialized in close range combat and my position is usually tank. I only accept a %s, which will last for %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.no_items_to_trade: %s: Sorry, i have nothing i can give you for that emerald
ui.magic_realms.permanent_contract_insuf: %s: I don't completely trust you, sorry, maybe ask me in %d minutes?
ui.magic_realms.trade_success: %s: Thanks for the emerald! Take this in return
spell.magic_realms.slime_rain.guide: Summons magic slimes that fall from the sky.
